basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) Plastic & Burn Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 22-05-2026 on the official website of Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC: 5 years; Punjab Govt. employees: up to 45 years; Widow/Divorcee: up to 40 years; Contract employees in BFUHS: equivalent to service period

qualification.education_qualification: 2 years Diploma Course in Plastic Surgery Department in Medical College.
qualification.details: 2 years Diploma Course in Plastic Surgery Department in Medical College.

selection_process: Written Test Merit List (inter-se-merit of written test and marks of experience)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician recruitment is 11 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Plastic & Burn Technician posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years as of 01 January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Plastic & Burn Technician post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed a 2 years Diploma Course in the Plastic Surgery Department from a recognized Medical College to be eligible for the Plastic & Burn Technician position.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Plastic & Burn Technician post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Plastic & Burn Technician post by Baba Farid University of Health Sciences in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Plastic & Burn Technician position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Plastic & Burn Technician post will receive a salary of Rs. 21700 Per Month, which is as per Pay Level-3 of the 7th CPC.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test, followed by the creation of a Merit List based on the inter-se-merit of the written test and marks of experience.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for the BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician Recruitment 2026 can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the direct link provided.

faq.question: Q10. Which state is this government job notification for?
faq.answer: This government job notification is for the state of Punjab, with the recruitment being conducted by Baba Farid University of Health Sciences located in Faridkot.
